maxItems.title: Max Items
maxItems.description: Free users: Limited to 10 items (preview). Paid users: Optional, max 1,000,000.

searchUrls.title: Wellfound search URLs
searchUrls.description: One or many Wellfound search URLs. The scraper visits each in sequence and aggregates jobs. Examples: https://wellfound.com/jobs, https://wellfound.com/role/software-engineer, https://wellfound.com/location/san-francisco, https://wellfound.com/role/data-scientist.
searchUrls.sectionDescription: Camoufox + residential proxy handles the DataDome challenge. Provide multiple URLs to surpass the per-page card cap.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: US residential proxy is recommended for reliable DataDome bypass.
